title: 2023-10 API Limit 500
excerpt:
Hi All. With the new 2023-10 API. It seems that there is a limit of 500 records. 
Does anyone know if this is a limit on the preview version only or if it will be there for the production version as well?

posts.author: justinvandyk (Justin van Dyk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi All. With the new 2023-10 API. It seems that there is a limit of 500 records.

Does anyone know if this is a limit on the preview version only or if it will be there for the production version as well?

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @justinvandyk,
It will be on the production version as well. To get all items, you will have to use cursor
